name: Hachishaku
short_description: Search the village of Naninani Mura to find answers about your past and evade the hauntingly beautiful 8 foot tall HachiShaku-sama!
detailed_description:
• Narrative

    In the recently abandoned village of NaniNani Mura, the last in a lineage of pure monks named Chado-san searches for answers about why he was sent away to Tokyo as a child, why the residents have all fled, and what happened to the beautiful child hood friend he remembers fondly. However a legendary Spirit haunts the village and is hunting your pure energy! Protect Chado-san's purity and find a way to escape Hachishaku's grasp!

  • Gameplay

    Hachishaku is a stalker horror style game where you investigate the village, find answers, search for the 5 sacred jizo to return them to their shrines, and collect money to buy various costumes, accessories and hair styles for your 8 foot tall stalker. Read the journals and notes left by the villagers to discover the truth about the village's past. Find photographic evidence of Hachishaku forgotten by time!

  • Launch Content and Update Plans! 

    The game includes 10 costumes, 6 hair styles, and plenty of accessories and hats to save your coins for at launch, but more will be considered and added in the future! Soon after launch an update will also let you enjoy the Gravure Mode - a peaceful life with Hachishaku in her secret hideout. 

Escape the village, Get spirited away, or confront your duty!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
